c.d: Number of monthly active users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App analytics platforms, company reports, market research firms

c.d: Percentage of sale price or flat fees charged to sellers, affecting profitability
c.s: Official app documentation, terms of service, seller guidelines

c.d: Breadth and depth of supported item categories, from general marketplace to niche specialization
c.s: App store descriptions, platform category listings, user interface analysis

c.d: Quality of photo editing tools, description templates, pricing suggestions, and overall listing process simplicity
c.s: User interface testing, feature documentation, user reviews

c.d: Authentication services, buyer protection, seller verification, dispute resolution mechanisms
c.s: Platform policy pages, safety feature documentation, user testimonials
